task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the stove and place it on the plate
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.17). Localized scene via back-projection on world_NN.npy (agentview) and world_wrist_NN.npy (wrist). BOWL ON STOVE: prior attempt localization at row=120 col=95 → world(-0.229,-0.119,0.931) reused; pre-positioned eef at (-0.23,-0.13,1.10) and confirmed via wrist cam (image_wrist_02 shows the stove cook region with concentric burner rings and the akita bowl inside). PI0_PICK with full task language 'Pick the akita black bowl on the stove and place it on the plate' (max_chunks=25, lift_thresh=0.08, gripper_closed_thresh=0.04) succeeded: peak_lift_m=0.0888, min_gripper_opening=0.005 (bowl wall held). PLATE LOCALIZATION FIX: prior failed attempt used plate world (-0.054,+0.152,0.902) but actual plate (re-derived from world_07/world_08, z=0.905-0.925, y>0.15) spans x[-0.02,+0.11] y[+0.15,+0.27] with center ~(+0.05,+0.21). This was the root cause of prior failure - plate was 6cm offset in y from what previous agent thought. Wrist-cam refinement at carry pose confirmed bowl held at world (+0.025,+0.176) with eef at (+0.008,+0.231) giving bowl-eef y-offset = -0.055 (variable per grasp). Final placement: eef moved to (+0.03,+0.265,1.00); world_wrist_09 confirmed bowl at world (+0.045,+0.215,0.987) - directly over plate center. Release fired On(bowl,plate) predicate immediately (libero_terminated=true in 10 commands, no resets needed). Bowl-eef y-offset for libero_spatial_task t9 grasp = -0.055 (not the memory default 0.045).

localization.method: manual back-projection from world_NN.npy (agentview, ±8-13cm) and world_wrist_NN.npy (wrist, ±1-2cm); segment tool not available (unknown action)

bowl_on_stove.wrist_refined_pre_pick: stove cook region centered at world (-0.19,-0.13,0.93) with bowl rim visible
